raw_consumer_statement: XXXX XXXX, XXXX, and XX/XX/XXXX someone used my card for six grocery purchases in XXXX, Florida. I was not in XXXX those days, and I have proof from phone records, and XXXX XXXX Hotel receipt for XX/XX/XXXX, and from XXXX records that I was nowhere near XXXX on those dates. Since XX/XX/XXXX I have had repeated conversations with Barclay Band Fraud Investigation Department to no avail. They claim that these charges were made by XXXX with my phone. But, I was using my phone ( records prove this and prove that I was at home in XXXX. The Bank has now threatened to report me to all the Credit agencies if I do not pay. So, I did pay the charges I did not authorize to avoid interest and late-fees. However, I am XXXX XXXX old and probably should not worry about a bad credit score since my grave, casket, and tomb stone are already paid for! How about some help. I did not shop at XXXX in XXXX those days, and I want my money back without any more trouble from Barclay Bank.
